title: 理事長代理の評価アップ

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, my apologies. There were aspects of your
training that were rather informative.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I may have been sharp with you before, but your
training does have plenty of its own merits.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I can tell that you're watching your trainee
closely.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to witnessing your future
endeavors.
